\tzpentry{ID11396}{Laplace-Style THZ Breathing Interface Pressure}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
The THZ/breathing interface pressure jump is modeled by an interface tension times the sum of reciprocal curvature radii.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\Delta P_{\mathrm{THZ/E}}=\sigma_{\mathrm{THZ/E}}\left(\frac{1}{R_{\mathrm{THZ}}}+\frac{1}{R_{E}}\right)
